title: Qodly Shared CSS
description: JSON schema for shared_css.json — project-wide reusable CSS classes available to all Qodly pages. Located at Project/Sources/Shared/shared_css.json.

classes.description: Array of reusable CSS class definitions. Applied to components via the classNames prop array.

name.description: CSS class name. Referenced in component props.classNames arrays across all pages.

content.description: Raw CSS content. Use 'self' as the selector for the target element. Supports pseudo-selectors (:hover, :active, :focus), pseudo-elements (:after), @media queries, :has() selectors, descendant selectors, and CSS animations.

parentId.description: Parent class ID for inheritance. null = top-level (no parent).

origin.description: Origin identifier (appears in some classes, likely tracking provenance).
